name: The Dragon that Devours the Dogma
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>痕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>らいし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Dragon that Devours the Stigmata
desc:
"Fallen of Albaz" + 1 LIGHT or DARK monster + 1 Effect Monster
While an "Ecclesia" monster is on the field or in either GY, this card gains 500 ATK, also it is unaffected by other cards' effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "The Dragon that Devours the Dogma" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can shuffle up to 2 cards from any GY(s) and/or banishment into the Deck. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was sent there this turn: You can add 1 "Dogmatika" or "Tri-Brigade" card from your Deck to your hand.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Deck
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
